SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.agent

Record Class DummyAgent

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
edu.bu.pas.risk.agent.DummyAgent
Record Components:
agentId - The id of the agent.
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAgent, RiskListener, Cloneable
public record DummyAgent(int agentId) extends Record implements IAgent
When we provide copies of GameView to you, we replace the actual agents with these dummy agents for security reasons.

  • Constructor Details

    • DummyAgent

  • Method Details

    • getAction

      public Action getAction(GameView game, int actionCounter, boolean canRedeemCards)
      Returns this agent's choice of an action at the given game state.

      The Risk code will call this method many times, until you return a FortifyAction or a NoAction to end your turn. Every time this method is called, we increment the actionCounter by 1. This means at the start of your turn, it will always be 0.

      The order of actions is as follows:

      1. Any number, including 0 RedeemCardsActions
      2. Any number, including 0 AttackActions
      3. If eliminating an agent gives you 6 or more territory cards, then you must immediately trade in enough sets to reduce your hand to 4 or fewer cards. But once your hand is reduced to 4, 3, or 2 cards, you must stop trading.
      4. Exactly 1 of FortifyAction or NoAction (to skip fortify)
      Specified by:
      getAction in interface IAgent
      Parameters:
      game - The game state.
      actionCounter - How many actions you have taken so far this turn. Starts at 0 always.
      canRedeemCards - If you are allowed to send in a RedeemCardsAction. This is true when you have not started your attack phase, and have enough cards to trade in. This is also true when you have eliminated an opponent and now have 6 or more territory cards.
      Returns:
      The action you choose to do at this point in the game.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • agentId

      public int agentId()
      Returns the value of the agentId record component.
      Specified by:
      agentId in interface IAgent
      Returns:
